description: Field exposure-correction chain on a technique-sheet backdrop: header strip 'SHEET: 8 MIN / 60 Ci / 30 IN SFD'; baseline card 8 MIN (clipboard), × 2 decay card (falling activity curve 60 → 30 Ci), running total = 16 MIN, × 1.78 distance card (source + 30/40 IN arcs, (40/30)² = 1.78), result chip ~ 28.5 MIN with pencil underline. No density slot.
